inpaint.description: Portrait image with mask over cheek/eye region; tests local repair and mask edge.
inpaint.prompt: natural portrait photograph, consistent skin texture, soft window light
inpaint.negative_prompt: scar, blurry, distorted face, sharp mask edge

inpaint.description: Landscape/product scene with foreground object masked; tests background synthesis.
inpaint.prompt: clean realistic background, consistent lighting and perspective
inpaint.negative_prompt: duplicate object, smear, obvious edit, hard edge
